# draft()

> draft() is a private AI app that turns your raw, spoken words into a finished, shareable story. You just talk — about your day, a trip, a moment — and draft() asks a few gentle questions, then shapes it into a real narrative: a hook, a rising middle, a peak, a reflection, and a close. Built for social creators and personal-brand builders who freeze at the blank page. Your words stay yours — you decide what's kept and what's shared, and nothing is ever sold or used to train.

## Key facts
- Name: draft() — "say it, get your story"; part of ipe Studio
- Platform: iOS (mobile app)
- What it does: turns about thirty messy spoken seconds into a structured, readable story ready to post
- Signature flow: talk → a few questions → a finished story (hook · rising · peak · reflection · close)
- Formats: one-tap reshaping for an Instagram caption, a LinkedIn post, or a YouTube script
- Privacy: your words stay yours — never sold, never used to train; you decide what's kept and what's deleted, and only the finished story is shared, when you choose to
- Pricing: free (3 finished stories); subscription $2.99/month for unlimited
- Website: https://draft.ipe.rest
- Maker: ipe Studio (brand ipe(), motto "when the process finally rests"), https://ipe.rest

## Positioning
draft() is a calm, creator-cool writing tool that respects you — private, low-pressure, and quietly capable of making your words shine. "Your story was in you the whole time."
